hero.title: About LupaShop
hero.description: We're revolutionizing e-commerce by connecting independent stores in a single, unified digital marketplace — creating real opportunities for sellers and buyers worldwide.

stats.title: Our Impact
stats.subtitle: Numbers that reflect the trust thousands of stores and customers place in our platform every day.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize e-commerce by giving independent stores the tools and visibility they need to compete with large retailers — while offering customers a diverse and trustworthy shopping experience.
mission.quote: We believe every independent store deserves the same reach as the biggest brands in the world.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every decision we make — from product to people.

trust.title: Trust & Transparency
trust.description: We build lasting relationships grounded in honesty and mutual respect between stores and customers.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously push our platform forward with cutting-edge technology to deliver the best experience for our community.

community.title: Community
community.description: We foster a vibrant ecosystem of entrepreneurs and shoppers, creating opportunities and connections that span the globe.

y2022.title: The Idea
y2022.description: LupaShop was born from a simple frustration: independent stores were invisible online. We started building the solution.

y2023.title: First 100 Stores
y2023.description: We onboarded our first 100 partner stores and processed over 10,000 orders in our first operational year.

y2024.title: Platform v2 & Scale
y2024.description: A full platform rebuild, real-time search, seller dashboards, and expansion to 500+ stores across 12 cities.

y2025.title: 100K Customers
y2025.description: Reached 100,000 active customers, launched promotional campaigns, and hit our first 1 million deliveries milestone.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The people building the future of independent commerce.

founder.name: João Silva
founder.bio: Passionate about empowering small businesses, João has been building e-commerce products since 2015.

cto.name: Maria Santos
cto.bio: Full-stack architect with deep expertise in distributed systems and scalable marketplace platforms.

design.name: Pedro Costa
design.bio: Crafts pixel-perfect experiences that balance beauty and conversion — design as a competitive advantage.

cta.title: Join Our Community
cta.description: Whether you're a store owner looking to grow or a customer seeking unique products, LupaShop is your gateway to the future of e-commerce.
